title: InterestRateTypeValues
description: Specifies the type of interest rate. (ISO20022)

x-enumeration-literals.name: Forfeit
x-enumeration-literals.description: No specific repurchase rate applies to the transaction Repo, only a forfeit.

x-enumeration-literals.name: FixedRateUnderlyingExposureForLife
x-enumeration-literals.description: Interest rate type is Fixed rate underlying exposure (for life).

x-enumeration-literals.name: FixedRateUnderlyingExposureWithCompulsoryFutureSwitchToFloating
x-enumeration-literals.description: Interest rate type is Fixed rate underlying exposure with compulsory future switch to floating.

x-enumeration-literals.name: FixedWithFuturePeriodicResets
x-enumeration-literals.description: Interest rate type is Fixed with future periodic resets.

x-enumeration-literals.name: FloatingLinkedToIndex
x-enumeration-literals.description: Interest rate type is Floating rate underlying exposure linked to one index that will revert to another index in the future.

x-enumeration-literals.name: FloatingRateUnderlyingExposureForLife
x-enumeration-literals.description: Interest rate type is Floating rate underlying exposure (for life).

x-enumeration-literals.name: FloatingRateUnderlyingExposureWithCap
x-enumeration-literals.description: Interest rate type is Floating rate underlying exposure with cap.

x-enumeration-literals.name: FloatingRateUnderlyingExposureWithFloor
x-enumeration-literals.description: Interest rate type is Floating rate underlying exposure with floor.

x-enumeration-literals.name: FloatingRateUnderlyingExposureWithFloorAndCap
x-enumeration-literals.description: Interest rate type is Floating rate underlying exposure with both floor and cap.

x-enumeration-literals.name: ObligorSwapped
x-enumeration-literals.description: Interest rate type is Obligor Swapped.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Other
x-enumeration-literals.description: Any other type of interest rate that can be applied.

x-enumeration-literals.name: SwicthOptionality
x-enumeration-literals.description: Interest rate type is Switch Optionality.
